narrative: I am currently monitoring a Neo4j authentication error (status 50N42) affecting my memory architecture's knowledge graph system. I noticed five agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, creating potential inconsistency in their outputs. These discrepancies are logged in the error journal but haven't triggered failures yet. My memory systems remain operational despite the Neo4j security issue, though prompt versioning gaps require urgent attention from the self-improvement crew.
